name: products.php wizard 2-стъпков (single product)
precondition: STRESS Lab tenant, потребител с роля owner
action_steps: Стъпка 1: попълни име, цена, бройка, мин-бройка
smoke_sql: SELECT p.id, p.name, i.quantity, i.min_quantity FROM products p JOIN inventory i ON i.product_id = p.id WHERE p.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL 24 HOUR LIMIT 5
